arts.ttl: Pro-activity a refreshing theme in Thorup's new Norwich era
arts.sum: The refreshing commitment to pro-activity and self-focus has been a refreshing theme of Johannes Hoff Thorup's new Norwich City era, writes Samuel Seaman.

arts.ttl: ‘Best is yet to come’ – Swansea City vs Norwich City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Swansea City vs Norwich City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Best is yet to come’ – Swansea City vs Norwich City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
